AI_GPU_and_high_density_boundary.boundary: AI-ready design, GPU support and DCIM using AI do not establish physical accelerator inventory. RIO2 is not confirmed operational, and no live liquid-cooled capacity is inferred.

OSM_crosswalk.boundary: Five objects match provider facility names, addresses or cities. The landing station remains a network asset, and none of the OSM areas is treated as provider floor area.

certification_boundary.boundary: Uptime project modules and provider site codes are not always one-to-one. Design certification is not silently upgraded to constructed-facility or operational-sustainability certification.

development_RIO2.boundary: The 60MW power, 81MW IT-capacity label and 100MW infrastructure-support statement conflict or use different denominators. They are not combined, and no live liquid-cooled MW or customer load is inferred.

energy_and_environment_2024.boundary: Renewable electricity includes certificates and contracts; it is not proof of hourly physical matching. The reported 30% improvement is not converted into a PUE value.

featured_operating_card_arithmetic_check.boundary: These are source-integrity checks across eleven selected operating cards, not fleet totals, live IT load, usable floor area, sold capacity or additive valuation metrics. The four provider area inversions are preserved rather than silently corrected.

outlook.analytical_view: Cirion is one of Latin America's most important private integrated data-center and fiber platforms, but its expansion opportunity is paired with a stressed capital structure. The strongest near-term evidence is physical demand and contracted hyperscaler interest; the weakest is free cash flow, leverage, current denominator consistency and separable data-center profitability.

ownership_and_financial_boundary_USD_mil.boundary: S&P figures are rating-adjusted actuals, estimates or forecasts as labelled, not audited Cirion statements. Cirion includes networks, connectivity, cloud and communications as well as data centers. The acquisition value is not current enterprise value.

portfolio_scope_reconciliation.boundary: The 18-row SOC2 roster plus two explicitly new activations yields a 20-label current evidence floor, not a claim that Cirion's current total is exactly 20. Featured main sites, edge sites, service-audit facilities, developments and construction counts use different scopes and are not added.

power_cooling_and_equipment_boundary.boundary: Provider sheets contain unusually useful equipment counts and topologies, but nameplate and design data are not an as-built asset register or utilization record.

records.current_status_boundary: The audited service description establishes a facility during its stated period. It is not a current ownership-title, capacity, utilization or site-economics statement.

records.boundary: Activation wording supports a current facility label, but the published power and rack fields are design or capacity labels rather than live utilized load.

The May 2026 provider release still calls RIO2 planned for construction and the current page says opening in 2026. No commissioning, acceptance or ready-for-service evidence was found, so RIO2 is excluded from current operating counts and capacity sums.

records.count_boundary: OSM is location evidence, not proof of ownership, operating status, gross floor area, IT load or financial contribution. The Las Toninas landing station is excluded from compute-facility counts despite its telecom=data_center tag.
